economic_notes: First Nation operates retail sales (gas, tobacco, confectionary, diesel, cannabis), oil and gas royalties from mineral rights on designated reserve land, Painted Hand CDC involvement, SIGA revenue securing FNFA debentures. Recreation Centre project underway.
notes: Province is Saskatchewan despite AB placeholder. Consolidated entities include Pheasant Rump Nakota First Nation #68, CMHC Housing, Pheasant Rump General Partner Ltd., and Pheasant Rump Master Development Limited Partnership (3 subsidiaries). Large increase in tangible capital assets from ~$9.9M to ~$21.6M due to significant capital construction activity (Rapid Housing Initiative $3.6M, subdivision expansion, solid waste transfer station, etc.). ISC accounts receivable jumped from $344K to $3.23M. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($11,282,767) + CMHC ($81,606) + RHI ($3,618,578) + GICB ($1,523,606) + FSIN ($421,447) + SIIT ($51,199) = $16,979,203 but FSIN and SIIT may not be government transfers; conservative estimate used. Yorkton Tribal Council Child and Family Services not consolidated. New accounting standards PS 3400 and PS 3160 adopted April 1, 2023 prospectively. Project management cash of $1,229,033 held by capital project managers for ISC-funded projects.
